mindset.title: The Mindset Behind the Code.
mindset.item1_desc: I don't write isolated code; I build reusable blocks that allow evolution without breaking the base.
mindset.item2_desc: If it can be automated, it should be automated. Time is an organization's most expensive resource.
mindset.item3_desc: Architecture must be legible. I deliver systems that your team can understand and inherit.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.section1_desc: I collect information you provide directly to me, such as when you fill out the contact form on this website. This includes your name and email address.
privacy_policy.section2_desc: I use the information collected to respond to your inquiries and communicate with you about potential projects or services.
privacy_policy.section3_desc: I retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, unless a longer retention period is required by law.
privacy_policy.section4_desc: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of receiving communications from me at any time by contacting me directly.
privacy_policy.section5_desc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact me at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_desc: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use this website.
terms.section2_desc: This website showcases software architecture, SaaS development, and automation services offered by Pedro Moreno. The information provided is for informational purposes only.
terms.section3_desc: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Pedro Moreno and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.section4_desc: This website is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Pedro Moreno shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or the services described herein.
terms.section5_desc: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact me at
